name: reduce_reduce
grammar:
start: a | b
a: X
b: X
X: "x"
error: Reduce/Reduce collision in Terminal('$END') between the following rules:

name: reduce_reduce_priority
grammar:
start: a | b
a.2: X
b.1: X
X: "x"

name: shift_reduce_dangling_else
grammar:
start: stmt
?stmt: "if" cond "then" stmt           -> if_then
     | "if" cond "then" stmt "else" stmt -> if_then_else
     | "s"                              -> simple
cond: "c"
%import common.WS
%ignore WS
